## Executive Summary
This report captures the evaluation results of the LangGraph Agent V2 against the expanded evaluation dataset. 
It utilizes the **V4 Query-Aware Evaluation Framework** to intelligently parse intents, enforce rigid mathematical assertions, and output Subsystem ID Warnings instead of false-positive failures.

## Performance Metrics
- **Total Test Cases**: 100
- **Passed (Perfect Math & Semantic)**: 39
- **Failed**: 61
- **Subsystem ID Warnings (Non-Fatal)**: 2
- **Overall True Business Accuracy**: 39.0%

## 🔍 Semantic Passes (The Magic of LLM-as-a-Judge)
These are cases where the agent passed mathematically and semantically, even though the text was completely different.

### Example 1:\n- **Query**: Show labor cost for subsystem 42.\n- **Expected**: The labor cost for subsystem 42 (Mechanical Systems - Podium) is $33,899.42.\n- **Actual**: Subsystem 42 (Mechanical Systems - Podium) cost breakdown is labor 33899.42, material 32670.7, and equipment 11327.86.\n\n### Example 2:\n- **Query**: Show labor cost for subsystem 4.\n- **Expected**: The labor cost for subsystem 4 (Landscaping - South Wing) is $44,955.24.\n- **Actual**: Subsystem 4 (Landscaping - South Wing) cost breakdown is labor 44955.24, material 17194.34, and equipment 7133.54.\n\n### Example 3:\n- **Query**: Show labor cost for subsystem 56.\n- **Expected**: The labor cost for subsystem 56 (Parking - West Annex) is $333,390.41.\n- **Actual**: Subsystem 56 (Parking - West Annex) cost breakdown is labor 333390.41, material 102383.29, and equipment 42981.7.\n\n### Example 4:\n- **Query**: Show labor cost for subsystem 34.\n- **Expected**: The labor cost for subsystem 34 (Plumbing - Sector 1) is $519,466.77.\n- **Actual**: Subsystem 34 (Plumbing - Sector 1) cost breakdown is labor 519466.77, material 184521.36, and equipment 135892.98.\n\n### Example 5:\n- **Query**: Show labor cost for subsystem 23.\n- **Expected**: The labor cost for subsystem 23 (Telecommunications - Podium) is $190,127.97.\n- **Actual**: Subsystem 23 (Telecommunications - Podium) cost breakdown is labor 190127.97, material 82380.43, and equipment 34772.54.\n\n## ❌ Failed Cases
